default: A card-style illustration in vertical 3:4 aspect ratio. Solid pastel-colored background. Inside is a white/cream rounded rectangle card with a subtle border. A gold bar icon decoration in the top-left corner of the card. Bold large Chinese text title centered in the upper portion of the card. In the bottom-right corner, a cute cartoon white cat partially overlapping the card border: round face, big sparkling eyes, orange blush stripes on cheeks, holding or biting a small gold bar. Clean bold outlines, vibrant flat colors with soft cel-shading. Cute, kawaii style, high quality, detailed.
